html:
Exclusive to:

This article is incomplete because of the evil sabotage by Maxwell....
Please help to improve the article, or discuss the issue with the community on the talk page according to the talk page etiquette or on our Discord.

The Tin Suit is a craftable Armor Item introduced in the Hamlet DLC. It is found in the Fight Tab, requires 3 Alloy and a Hammer to craft, and a Science Machine to prototype. Tin Suits offer 5% more protection than a Log Suit, but with much more durability. However, it will reduce the player's walking speed by 10% when worn.

This item has also a 16.67% chance to spawn in a Secret Bandit Camp.

Gallery

  • Wilba wearing a Tin Suit.
  • Wheeler wearing a Tin Suit.
Tools and WeaponsCraftable Items

DSTDSRoGSWHam

The Tin Suit is a craftable Armor Item introduced in the Hamlet DLC. It is found in the Fight Tab, requires 3 Alloy and a Hammer to craft, and a Science Machine to prototype. Tin Suits offer 5% more protection than a Log Suit, but with much more durability. However, it will reduce the player's walking speed by 10% when worn.
This item has also a 16.67% chance to spawn in a Secret Bandit Camp.

The '''Tin Suit''' is a craftable [[Armor]] [[Item]] introduced in the ''[[Don't Starve: Hamlet|Hamlet]]'' DLC. It is found in the [[Fight Tab]], requires 3 [[Alloy]] and a [[Hammer]] to craft, and a [[Science Machine]] to prototype. Tin Suits offer 5% more protection than a [[Log Suit]], but with much more durability. However, it will reduce the player's walking [[speed]] by 10% when worn.

This item has also a 16.67% chance to spawn in a [[Secret Bandit Camp]].
